description: THE CLARKE COURIER I ESTABLISHED 1869 Publisher Stacy B Lloyd Jr Managing Editor G Kenneth Levi k Entered As Second Class Mail Matter at the Postoffice In Berryville Virginia Published Weekly At Berryville Clarke County Virginia Subscription Price Paid in Advance 300 a Year Six Months 200 Three Months 100 Single Copy 10c Classified Advertising Rates two cents a word Minimum charge 25 cents Display advertising rates upon request Established first by Captain Wm N Nelson Owned and edited by the late John O Crown and Joseph W Crown for 35 years and by Ralph N Dorsey for 11 years Drawings by John Absten from Dun Juan used by permission of Dodd Mead and Co Publishers Kate Greenaway drawings published by permission of Frederick Warn Co original publishers Thursday September 11 1947 FASCISM IN VIRGINIA The Virginia News of Arlington is much disturbed over what it terms the growing laseism in lrginia At some expense and trou ble it it as reprinted an editorial oil the subject and sent it to the Vir ginia press it complains about the appointment of Abe Staples tormer AttorneyGeneral to the State Supreme Court of Appeals his replacement with a man from the State
